summary: This is a brief announcement post where Cathy O'Neil promotes two upcoming speaking engagements. The first is a math colloquium talk on data science at Dartmouth's Math department. The second is a panel she will moderate at All Souls Unitarian Church in Manhattan. The post is purely promotional with no substantive argument or analysis.
key_points: O'Neil will give a data science colloquium talk at Dartmouth Math department
She will moderate a panel on 'Mega-Foundations' at All Souls Unitarian Church in Manhattan
The post includes promotional posters for both events
key_insight: This is a simple event announcement with no analytical content to extract insights from.
